narrative: US-Iran peace hopes drive a dollar sell-off as geopolitical risk premiums unwind — DXY steady; gold higher +0.62%; equities -0.25%; VIX 17.3. NZD/CAD bilateral divergence dominates the G8 (+1.237% spread) as NZD (+0.722%, n=4) outperforms CAD (-0.515%, n=3) on RBNZ hike bias. USD/JPY holds at 156.66, supported by a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage despite the broader USD retreat. Watch RBNZ rate decision on May 27 for further NZD directional momentum.
